'''Slopper''' was a [[Saurian (species)|Saurian]] who worked for [[Sithless Leethe]]. He was not very intelligent however, and was rather easy to dupe if someone were to attempt it. He was once assigned to accompany a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] hopefuls on board the ''[[Limping Lady]]'' when they delivered [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] weapons to the [[Felinian]] natives of [[Zoma V]].
